title: planchonella dothioensis
intro: Planchonella dothioensis, also known as the "White Sapote", is a tropical fruit-bearing tree native to the Pacific Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Planchonella dothioensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant's leaves, bark, and fruit can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, offering a natural remedy for various ailments.
